notes:
Two new manga sources: MangaPill + MangaKatana.

Two big, free manga/manhwa libraries, added alongside MangaDex and Weeb Central. In Browse, tap the source pills to search each one - full support for search, covers, chapter lists (newest-first), and the reader. You can also switch a title between sources from its detail page.

Heads up: the second source you asked about, Natomanga, turned out to be Cloudflare-locked - every page is a "checking your browser" wall the app can't get past - so I swapped in MangaKatana, a cleaner and fully-working library, instead.
